# cpp-httplib (vendored)

Single-header HTTP/HTTPS server + client library.

- Upstream: https://github.com/yhirose/cpp-httplib
- Pinned version: **v0.46.0**
- License: MIT (see `LICENSE`)

Only `httplib.h` is used. To update, download the matching tagged release
from upstream and overwrite `httplib.h` and `LICENSE` together.
